validation_queries.error_message: Expected at least one 'pthread_create' region from the pthread gotcha.
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name = 'pthread_create'

validation_queries.description: The pthread_create region carries a return trace-arg of 0
validation_queries.error_message: Expected the pthread_create region to record a 'return' trace-arg equal to 0.
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM region_args A INNER JOIN regions R ON R.id = A.id AND R.guid = A.guid WHERE R.name = 'pthread_create' AND A.name = 'return' AND A.value = '0'

validation_queries.description: The pthread_create region carries an arg0 annotation trace-arg
validation_queries.error_message: Expected the pthread_create region to record an 'arg0-*' trace-arg.
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM region_args A INNER JOIN regions R ON R.id = A.id AND R.guid = A.guid WHERE R.name = 'pthread_create' AND A.name LIKE 'arg0%'
